zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Mallory IV於1497年出生在英國越可爾時，他的父親John Mallory25歲，母親Margaret Thwaites21歲。他於1521年與Jane Norton在英國英格蘭越可爾利朋結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和9個女兒的父母。他去世於1547年4月27日在英國英格蘭越可爾享年50歲，埋葬在英國越可爾利朋。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Mallory IV于1497年出生在英国越可爾时，他的父亲John Mallory25岁，母亲Margaret Thwaites21岁。他于1521年与Jane Norton在英国英格兰越可爾利朋结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和9个女儿的父母。他去世于1547年4月27日在英国英格兰越可爾享年50岁，埋葬在英国越可爾利朋。

nameMeanings.name: Mallory
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): nickname for an unfortunate person, from Old French maloret, maloré, maleuré ‘ill-fortuned, unlucky’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Mallory IV was born in 1497, in Yorkshire, England, his father, John Mallory, was 25 and his mother, Margaret Thwaites, was 21. He married Jane Norton in 1521, in Ripon, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 9 daughters. He died on 27 April 1547, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50, and was buried in Ripon, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Mallory IV est né en 1497, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, John Mallory, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Margaret Thwaites, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Jane Norton en 1521, à Ripon, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 9 filles. Il est décédé le 27 avril 1547, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Ripon, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Mallory IV 1497 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Mallory 25 und seine Mutter Margaret Thwaites 21. Er hat 1521 in Ripon, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Jane Norton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Er starb am 27. April 1547 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Ripon, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Mallory IV è nato il nel 1497 nel Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, John Mallory, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Thwaites, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Jane Norton nel 1521, nel Ripon, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 9 figlie. Morì il 27 aprile 1547, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Ripon, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Mallory IVが1497年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Malloryは25歳，母Margaret Thwaitesは21歳であった。1521年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアリプオンでJane Nortonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼は1547年4月27日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで50歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアリプオンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Mallory IV(이)가 1497년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Mallory(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Thwaites(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1521년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 리폰에서 Jane Norton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1547년 4월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 리폰에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Mallory IV nasceu em 1497, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Mallory, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Thwaites, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane Norton em 1521, em Ripon, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 9 filhas. Ele faleceu em 27 de abril de 1547, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Ripon, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Mallory IV родился в 1497 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Mallory было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Thwaites, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Norton в 1521 г. в местности рипон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 9 дочерей. Он умер 27 апреля 1547 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности рипон, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Mallory IV nació en 1497, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Mallory, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Margaret Thwaites, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Jane Norton en 1521, en Ripon, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 9 hijas. Murió el 27 de abril de 1547, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Ripon, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
